items.title: Concordant Treasury (Demo Account)
items.summary: Hub treasury, 28 transactions across 90 days. Revenue: bazaar fees, event takings, federation tithes. Expenses: Watch payroll, infirmary supplies, glyph-altar maintenance.

items.title: Velka's Stall Ledger (Demo)
items.summary: Single-stall demo ledger for the Bazaar trader. 90 days. Shows seasonal-flow + off-ledger smuggling spike (intentional, for audit-detection demo).

items.title: Seven Spokes Inn Ledger (Demo)
items.summary: Innkeep Baren Hollow's 90-day ledger. Revenue: rooms, suppers, ale. Expenses: supplier costs, brewery upkeep, the always-rising candle bill.
